title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Frontend Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
